---
name: Model request
about: Request a new model to be added to the ladder
title: "[MODEL] "
labels: enhancement, model
assignees: ''
---

**Model name and HuggingFace repo**
e.g. `mlx-community/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct-4bit`

**Engine**
- [ ] MLX (Apple Silicon)
- [ ] GGUF (CUDA / ROCm / Vulkan / CPU)

**Is it MoE?**
- [ ] Yes — active params: ___B / total: ___B
- [ ] No — total params: ___B

**RAM footprint (GB)**

**Why should it be added?**
e.g. Better coding performance at 16 GB tier, new architecture, etc.

**Have you tested it with AIO?**
- [ ] Yes — tested on [device/RAM/backend]
- [ ] No
